mapper.select: SELECT margin_account_id, customer_id, currency, balance, frozen_amount, occupied_amount, status, created_at, updated_at FROM fx_margin_account WHERE margin_account_id = #{marginAccountId}

SELECT margin_account_id, customer_id, currency, balance, frozen_amount, occupied_amount, status, created_at, updated_at FROM fx_margin_account WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND currency = #{currency}

SELECT margin_account_id, customer_id, currency, balance, frozen_amount, occupied_amount, status, created_at, updated_at FROM fx_margin_account WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY currency, margin_account_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fx_margin_account (margin_account_id, customer_id, currency, balance, frozen_amount, occupied_amount, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{marginAccountId}, #{customerId}, #{currency}, #{balance}, #{frozenAmount}, #{occupiedAmount}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE fx_margin_account SET balance = #{balance}, frozen_amount = #{frozenAmount}, occupied_amount = #{occupiedAmount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE margin_account_id = #{marginAccountId}
